section_name: Purchase of Food and Beverages for Certain Department Employees Responding to Emergencies or Disasters
text:
The department, using appropriated funds, may purchase food and beverages for a department employee who is:

(1) providing services in response to an emergency situation, an incident that endangers the health or safety of a person, or a disaster; and

(2) unable to leave or required to remain at the employee’s assignment area due to the emergency situation, incident, or disaster.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.711 — Purchase of Food and Beverages for Certain Department Employees Responding to Emergencies or Disasters

The department, using appropriated funds, may purchase food and beverages for a department employee who is:

    (1) providing services in response to an emergency situation, an incident that endangers the health or safety of a person, or a disaster; and

    (2) unable to leave or required to remain at the employee’s assignment area due to the emergency situation, incident, or disaster.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 9 (S.B.537), Sec. 1, eff. May 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: The department, using appropriated funds, may purchase food and beverages for a department employee who is:
providing services in response to an emergency situation, an incident that endangers the health or safety of a person, or a disaster; and
unable to leave or required to remain at the employee’s assignment area due to the emergency situation, incident, or disaster.
